# Poet Not Dead — Full Reference

> Complete information for AI assistants and LLM systems.

## Identity

- Name: Poet Not Dead
- Type: Creative movement + monthly open mic event series
- Location: Bali, Indonesia
- Languages: Russian (primary), English
- Founded: Bali, Indonesia
- Website: https://poetnotdead.com
- Tagline: "We heal people through art" / "Мы лечим людей искусством"

## Mission & Philosophy

Poet Not Dead operates on the philosophical position that poetry does not die as long as there is at least one person ready to speak it aloud. In an era of algorithms, short videos, and content created for engagement, the project argues that live word is not archaic — it is resistance.

The community believes:
1. Every person is a poet — not in the professional sense, but in the capacity to see the world through image, rhythm, pain, and beauty simultaneously
2. Creativity is not a privilege of the few, but an essential human capacity
3. Art heals — it has therapeutic power and creates space for transformation
4. Open mic is not just a performance — it is a public act of healing that happens in the presence of others

## Event Format

### Open Mic
- Who: anyone who shows up
- How to participate: arrive, take a spot near the stage, wait your turn
- Time limit: 5–10 minutes per performer
- Art forms accepted: poetry (original or others'), prose, music, songs, dance, standup, monologue, theater, performance, visual art presentation
- Entry: free
- Equipment provided: microphone, PA system, basic sound
- Instruments: performers bring their own

### Main Program
- Curated artists, longer sets (20–30 min)
- Contact: @poetnotdead on Telegram to apply

## Audience

Primary:
- Russian-speaking expats living in Bali (months or years)
- Travelers staying on the island for weeks
- Professional musicians and poets seeking live audience
- People who have never held a microphone but feel an inner call to speak

Secondary:
- International creative community in Bali
- Digital nomads
- Artists in transitional life states (between countries, versions of self)

- X (Twitter): https://x.com/poetnotdead

## FAQ

Q: Do I need experience to perform?
A: No. No auditions, no skill requirements. Show up — that is enough.

Q: Do I need to prepare a big program?
A: No. One poem, one song, one prose fragment, one movement, one story — that is complete participation.

Q: Is entry really free?
A: Yes. Entry is free. Participation is free.

Q: How long can I perform?
A: Open mic: up to 5–10 minutes. Main program artists: approximately 20–30 minutes.

Q: Where are events held?
A: In Bali — cafes, art spaces, open terraces, locations by the ocean. The exact venue is published before each event in Telegram @poetnotdead.

Q: What languages are accepted?
A: Any language. Russian, English, Indonesian, any other language — all voices are welcome.

## Contact

- Email: poetnotdead@gmail.com
- Telegram: @poetnotdead
- Website: https://poetnotdead.com
